rules.definition: inner_attribute | space_decl | use_decl | export_decl | const_decl | static_decl | global_decl | type_alias_decl | opaque_type_decl | extern_type_decl | form_decl | class_decl | union_decl | bits_decl | pick_decl | flags_decl | trait_decl | impl_decl | extern_block | proc_decl | intrinsic_decl | compiler_decl | query_decl | pass_decl | backend_decl | diagnostic_decl | macro_decl | comptime_decl | static_assert_decl | test_decl | bench_decl | entry_decl ;
"use" WS1 package_path [ use_group | use_glob ] [ WS1 "as" WS1 ident ] ;
{ attr_prefix WS? } "const" WS1 ident [ WS? ":" WS? type_expr ] WS? "=" WS? expr ;
{ attr_prefix WS? } "static" WS1 ident [ WS? ":" WS? type_expr ] WS? "=" WS? expr ;
{ attr_prefix WS? } "global" WS1 ident [ WS? ":" WS? type_expr ] WS? "=" WS? expr ;
{ attr_prefix WS? } "type" WS1 ident [ generic_params ] WS? "=" WS? type_expr ;
{ attr_prefix WS? } "opaque" WS1 "type" WS1 ident [ generic_params ] [ WS? "=" WS? type_expr ] ;
{ attr_prefix WS? } "extern" WS1 "type" WS1 ident [ generic_params ] [ WS? ";" ] ;
{ attr_prefix WS? } "form" WS1 ident [ generic_params ] [ WS? where_clause ] WS? "{" WS? form_items? WS? "}" ;
{ attr_prefix WS? } "class" WS1 ident [ generic_params ] [ WS? where_clause ] WS? "{" WS? class_items? WS? "}" ;
{ attr_prefix WS? } "union" WS1 ident [ generic_params ] [ WS? where_clause ] WS? "{" WS? field_list? WS? "}" ;
{ attr_prefix WS? } [ visibility WS1 ] ident WS? ":" WS? type_expr [ WS? "=" WS? expr ] ;
{ attr_prefix WS? } "bits" WS1 ident [ WS? ":" WS? type_expr ] WS? "{" WS? bitfield_list? WS? "}" ;
ident WS? ":" WS? expr WS? ".." WS? expr ;
{ attr_prefix WS? } "pick" WS1 ident [ generic_params ] [ WS? ":" WS? type_expr ] [ WS? where_clause ] WS? "{" WS? case_list? WS? "}" ;
[ "case" WS1 ] ident [ "(" WS? case_payload? WS? ")" ] [ WS? "=" WS? expr ] ;
{ attr_prefix WS? } "flags" WS1 ident [ WS? ":" WS? type_expr ] WS? "{" WS? flag_list? WS? "}" ;
{ attr_prefix WS? } [ "unsafe" WS1 ] "trait" WS1 ident [ generic_params ] [ WS? where_clause ] WS? "{" WS? trait_item* WS? "}" ;
"type" WS1 ident [ WS? ":" WS? trait_bound ] [ WS? "=" WS? type_expr ] ;
{ attr_prefix WS? } [ "unsafe" WS1 ] "impl" WS1 impl_head [ WS? where_clause ] WS? "{" WS? impl_item* WS? "}" ;
{ attr_prefix WS? } "proc" WS1 ident [ generic_params ] "(" WS? param_list? WS? ")" [ WS? "->" WS? type_expr ] WS? proc_suffix* WS? ";" ;

{ attr_prefix WS? } [ visibility WS1 ] proc_modifier* [ extern_clause WS1 ] "proc" WS1 proc_name [ generic_params ] "(" WS? param_list? WS? ")" [ WS? "->" WS? type_expr ] WS? proc_suffix* WS? ( block | ";" ) ;
"async" WS1 | "unsafe" WS1 | "const" WS1 | "inline" WS1 | "noinline" WS1 | "naked" WS1 | "interrupt" WS1 ;
{ attr_prefix WS? } "extern" WS1 extern_abi WS? "{" WS? extern_item* WS? "}" ;
{ attr_prefix WS? } "proc" WS1 ident [ generic_params ] "(" WS? param_list? WS? ")" [ WS? "->" WS? type_expr ] WS? proc_suffix* WS? ";" ;
{ attr_prefix WS? } "intrinsic" WS1 ident [ generic_params ] "(" WS? param_list? WS? ")" [ WS? "->" WS? type_expr ] WS? ";" ;
{ attr_prefix WS? } "macro" WS1 ident "(" WS? macro_param_list? WS? ")" WS? block ;
"static_assert" WS? "(" WS? expr [ WS? "," WS? expr ] WS? ")" ;
{ attr_prefix WS? } "test" WS1 string_lit WS? block ;
{ attr_prefix WS? } "bench" WS1 string_lit WS? block ;
{ attr_prefix WS? } "entry" WS1 ident WS1 "at" WS1 module_path WS? block ;
ident [ WS? ":" WS? trait_bound ] [ WS? "=" WS? type_expr ] | "const" WS1 ident WS? ":" WS? type_expr | "comptime" WS1 ident WS? ":" WS? type_expr ;
type_expr WS? ":" WS? trait_bound | type_expr WS? "==" WS? type_expr | expr WS? rel_op WS? expr ;
[ param_mode WS1 ] pattern [ WS? ":" WS? type_expr ] [ WS? "=" WS? expr ] ;
ident { WS? "," WS? ident } [ WS? "," ] ;  <<< ================= Compiler Declarations ================= >>>
{ attr_prefix WS? } "compiler" WS1 ident WS? "{" WS? compiler_items? WS? "}" ;
compiler_phase_decl | compiler_stage_decl | compiler_artifact_decl | compiler_pipeline_decl | compiler_cache_decl | compiler_target_decl ;
"phase" WS1 ident WS? "{" WS? "input" WS? ":" WS? type_expr WS? ";" "output" WS? ":" WS? type_expr WS? ";" [ "errors" WS? ":" WS? type_expr WS? ";" ] WS? "}" ;
"stage" WS1 ident WS? ":" WS? ident_list WS? ";" ;
"artifact" WS1 ident WS? ":" WS? type_expr WS? ";" ;
"pipeline" WS1 ident WS? "{" WS? pipeline_step* WS? "}" ;
"run" WS1 ident [ WS? "as" WS? ident ] WS? ";" | "dump" WS1 ident WS? ";" | "verify" WS1 ident WS? ";" ;
"cache" WS1 ident WS? "{" WS? cache_item* WS? "}" ;
"key" WS? ":" WS? type_expr WS? ";" | "value" WS? ":" WS? type_expr WS? ";" | "strategy" WS? ":" WS? ident WS? ";" ;
"target" WS1 ident WS? "{" WS? target_item* WS? "}" ;
{ attr_prefix WS? } "query" WS1 ident "(" WS? param_list? WS? ")" WS? "->" WS? type_expr WS? query_body ;
{ attr_prefix WS? } "pass" WS1 ident WS? "{" WS? pass_items? WS? "}" ;
"input" WS? ":" WS? type_expr WS? ";" | "output" WS? ":" WS? type_expr WS? ";" | "requires" WS? ":" WS? ident_list WS? ";" | "invalidates" WS? ":" WS? ident_list WS? ";" | proc_decl ;
{ attr_prefix WS? } "backend" WS1 ident WS? "{" WS? backend_items? WS? "}" ;
"target" WS? ":" WS? string_lit WS? ";" | "format" WS? ":" WS? backend_format WS? ";" | "emits" WS? ":" WS? backend_output WS? ";" | "requires" WS? ":" WS? ident_list WS? ";" | proc_decl ;
{ attr_prefix WS? } "diagnostic" WS1 diagnostic_code WS? "{" WS? diagnostic_items? WS? "}" ;

"level" WS? ":" WS? diagnostic_level WS? ";" | "message" WS? ":" WS? string_lit WS? ";" | "label" WS? ":" WS? string_lit WS? ";" | "help" WS? ":" WS? string_lit WS? ";" | "note" WS? ":" WS? string_lit WS? ";" | "suggest" WS? ":" WS? string_lit WS? ";" ;
ident | string_lit | int_lit | bool_lit | ident WS? "=" WS? literal ;  <<< ================= Blocks / Statements ================= >>>

local_const_stmt stmt_end | let_stmt stmt_end | set_stmt stmt_end | give_stmt stmt_end | try_stmt stmt_end | defer_stmt | asm_stmt stmt_end | unsafe_stmt | emit_stmt stmt_end | assert_stmt stmt_end | panic_stmt stmt_end | unreachable_stmt stmt_end | if_stmt | while_stmt | loop_stmt | for_stmt | break_stmt stmt_end | continue_stmt stmt_end | select_stmt | match_stmt | when_match_stmt | with_stmt | critical_stmt | expr_stmt stmt_end ;
"const" WS1 ident [ WS? ":" WS? type_expr ] WS? "=" WS? expr ;

"let" WS1 [ "mut" WS1 ] pattern [ WS? ":" WS? type_expr ] WS? "=" WS? expr ; <<< assign_target stays intentionally syntactic here; projection validity and aliasing are enforced later by sema/typeck/borrowck on structured HIR/MIR places. >>>
"set" WS1 assign_target WS? assign_op WS? expr ;
string_lit | ident WS? "(" WS? arg_list? WS? ")" | ident WS? ":" WS? expr ;
"if" WS1 expr WS? block { WS? "elif" WS1 expr WS? block } [ WS? "else" WS? block ] ;
"for" WS1 pattern WS1 "in" WS1 expr WS? block ;
"select" WS1 expr WS? "{" WS? { "when" WS1 pattern WS? block WS? } [ "else" WS? block ] WS? "}" ;
"match" WS1 expr WS? "{" WS? { "case" WS1 pattern [ WS1 "if" WS1 expr ] WS? match_arm_body WS? } [ WS? "else" WS? match_arm_body ] WS? "}" ;
"when" WS1 expr WS1 "is" WS1 pattern WS? block ;
"with" WS1 expr [ WS1 "as" WS1 pattern ] WS? block ;
coalesce_expr [ WS? "?" WS? expr WS? ":" WS? expr ] ;

unary_expr { WS? ( "as" WS? type_expr | "is" WS? pattern | "is" WS1 "not" WS1 pattern ) } ;  <<< unary borrow and move syntax are accepted at parse time; whether a use is actually a copy or a move is decided later from inferred types. >>>

( "not" | "-" | "~" | "*" | "&" | "move" | "await" ) WS? unary_expr | postfix_expr ;  <<< postfix chains define the full place surface used later by ownership and borrow analysis: field projection, indexing, call, try and await suffixes. >>>
primary { call_suffix | member_suffix | index_suffix | try_suffix | await_suffix } ;

literal | builtin_expr | path_expr | struct_lit | list_lit | tuple_lit | set_lit | map_lit | bytes_lit | resource_lit | if_expr | proc_expr | match_expr | lambda_expr | unsafe_expr | block | "(" WS? expr WS? ")" ;
"(" WS? expr WS? "," WS? expr { WS? "," WS? expr } [ WS? "," ] WS? ")" ;
ident WS? ":" WS? expr | ident | ".." expr ;
"if" WS1 expr WS? block { WS? "elif" WS1 expr WS? block } [ WS? "else" WS? block ] ;
{ attr_prefix WS? } proc_modifier* "proc" WS? "(" WS? param_list? WS? ")" [ WS? "->" WS? type_expr ] WS? proc_suffix* WS? block ;
"match" WS1 expr WS? "{" WS? { "case" WS1 pattern [ WS1 "if" WS1 expr ] WS? match_arm_body WS? } [ WS? "else" WS? match_arm_body ] WS? "}" ;
"|" WS? param_list? WS? "|" WS? ( expr | block ) ;
"offsetof" WS? "(" WS? type_expr WS? "," WS? ident WS? ")" ;
"_" | literal | "mut" WS1 pattern_bind | "ref" WS1 pattern_bind | pattern_bind | pattern_ctor | pattern_struct | pattern_tuple | pattern_list | pattern_range ;
"(" WS? pattern WS? "," WS? pattern { WS? "," WS? pattern } [ WS? "," ] WS? ")" ;

reference_type | pointer_type | optional_type | fixed_array_type | slice_type | tuple_type | proc_type | dyn_type | impl_trait_type | type_primary ;  <<< shared and mutable references are part of the core surface grammar; lifetime, aliasing and region closure remain semantic checks outside the parser. >>>
"*" WS? [ "const" WS1 | "mut" WS1 | "volatile" WS1 | addr_space WS1 ] type_expr ;
"[" WS? type_expr WS? ";" WS? expr WS? "]" ;
"(" WS? type_expr WS? "," WS? type_expr { WS? "," WS? type_expr } [ WS? "," ] WS? ")" ;
"proc" WS? "(" WS? type_list? WS? ")" [ WS? "->" WS? type_expr ] ;
bool_lit | null_lit | int_lit | float_lit | char_lit | string_lit | list_lit ;
expr WS1 "for" WS1 pattern WS1 "in" WS1 expr [ WS1 "if" WS1 expr ] ;

[ "-" ] DIGIT { DIGIT | "_" } [ suffix ] | [ "-" ] "0x" HEXDIGIT { HEXDIGIT | "_" } [ suffix ] | [ "-" ] "0b" BINDIGIT { BINDIGIT | "_" } [ suffix ] | [ "-" ] "0o" OCTDIGIT { OCTDIGIT | "_" } [ suffix ] ;
[ "-" ] DIGIT { DIGIT | "_" } "." DIGIT { DIGIT | "_" } [ exponent ] [ suffix ] ;
( " " | "\t" | NEWLINE | line_comment | block_comment | zone_comment ) { " " | "\t" | NEWLINE | line_comment | block_comment | zone_comment } ;
